  FreeBSD ports repository

    java/diablo-jdk15    Makefile

  Log:
  . Make EXTRACT_DEPENDS check UNZIP_CMD rather than just unzip, since this
    is what we use doing the actual unzipping.  Fixes the build for
    FreeBSD 9.
